Brand.name: Dental Map
Brand.tagline: Egypt's booking engine for dentists — live availability, verified reviews.

Home.heroSubtitle: Search 50+ verified dentists across Cairo. See real open slots. Book instantly — the slot you pick lands in the clinic's own calendar.
Home.specialtiesSubtitle: Browse by what your teeth actually need.
Home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps. No calls. No confusion.
Home.howStep1Body: Filter by specialty, area, fee, insurance, or specific dentist.
Home.howStep2Body: Every slot is computed live from the dentist's own calendar.
Home.howStep3Body: Booking lands in the clinic's schedule. You get email + SMS reminders.
Home.forClinicsBody: Get Dental Map-quality patients. We plug into the Dentolize calendar you already use — no double entry.
Home.footerTagline: The dentist booking engine, wired to the clinic.

Search.resultsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No dentists found} =1 {1 dentist} other {# dentists}}
Search.emptyBody: Try widening your filters, or browse all dentistry below.

Profile.experience: {years, plural, =1 {1 year experience} other {# years experience}}
Profile.pickSlotSubtitle: Computed live from this dentist's calendar.
Profile.noSlots: No open slots in the next 7 days. Try a different dentist or check back later.

Booking.patientPhoneHint: The clinic uses this to reach you.
Booking.successBody: We sent the details to your email. The clinic has been notified — they'll call if anything changes.
Booking.alreadyTaken: Sorry — this slot was just taken. Pick another.
Booking.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Dashboard.gcalExplainBody: Dental Map reads your Google Calendar free/busy to compute open slots, and writes new bookings back into it. Dentolize users: point Dentolize at the same Google Calendar and the loop becomes automatic.
Dashboard.workingHoursSubtitle: Set the hours you see patients. Slots are generated inside these windows.
Dashboard.gcalStatus_connected: Your Google Calendar is connected. Dental Map will read free/busy and write confirmed bookings here.
Dashboard.gcalStatus_denied: You denied access. You can try again — we only request calendar scopes, nothing else.
Dashboard.gcalStatus_bad_state: Something went wrong with the handshake. Please try again.
Dashboard.gcalStatus_state_mismatch: Session mismatch. Please sign in and try again.
Dashboard.gcalStatus_no_refresh: Google didn't return a refresh token. Click Connect again and choose Allow.
Dashboard.bookingsEmpty: No bookings yet — patient-side search ships next week.
Dashboard.bookingsEmptyHint: When patients book, they'll appear here with phone, time, and quick actions.
Dashboard.clinicPlaceholder: Full clinic profile editor ships next. For now we're onboarding pilot clinics manually.
Dashboard.modePickerTitle: How do you want to manage availability?
Dashboard.modePickerSubtitle: You can change this any time. Most clinics start with Google Calendar.
Dashboard.modeGoogleBody: Best fit. Connect a Google Calendar — Dental Map reads free/busy and writes new bookings into it. If you use Dentolize or Dentalore, configure them to sync with this same Google Calendar and you're done.
Dashboard.modeManualBody: No calendar connection. Slots come purely from your working hours below. Best if you don't use any calendar software, or you'd rather copy bookings into Dentolize manually (we'll show one-click copy buttons in the bookings inbox).
Dashboard.modeBusyExplain: Slots = working hours below − anything blocking on your calendar.
Dashboard.modeManualExplain: Slots = working hours below − bookings on Dental Map.
Dashboard.publishBody: When ready, flip this on so patients can find and book your dentists.
Dashboard.bentoLeaderboardEmpty: Add dentists to see them here.
Dashboard.bentoActionsEmpty: All caught up. Nothing needs your attention.

Auth.signInSubtitle: Enter your details to access your bookings.
Auth.signUpSubtitle: It takes a minute. You'll need it to book.
Auth.phoneHint: Used by the clinic to reach you — required.

ForClinics.heroSubtitle: Dental Map plugs into the Google Calendar your Dentolize already syncs with. Patients book the slot — it lands in your real schedule. No double-entry, no app switching, no chasing receptionists.
ForClinics.trustLine: Free for the entire pilot. We don't take a cut of the consultation fee, ever.
ForClinics.whyTitle: Why clinics in Cairo are joining
ForClinics.whySubtitle: Built for the way Egyptian dental clinics actually work — Arabic-first, pay-at-visit, no integration headaches.
ForClinics.why1Body: Patients see your real free/busy in real time. Confirmed bookings write into your dentist's Google Calendar — and through it, into Dentolize. Zero manual reconciliation.
ForClinics.why2Body: Only patients with a completed appointment can review. No drive-by ratings, no anonymous trolls, no review-buying competitors.
ForClinics.why3Body: Each dentist gets an SEO-optimised profile in Arabic and English. We rank for 'dentist Nasr City' so you don't have to learn SEO.
ForClinics.why4Body: Free during the Cairo pilot. After that, a small per-booking fee — never a subscription, never a cut of the consultation fee.
ForClinics.why5Body: One-click WhatsApp confirmations, copy-to-Dentolize buttons, and a clean bookings inbox. The dashboard is built for the front desk, not the dentist.
ForClinics.why6Body: RTL throughout. Patient-facing pages render in fluent Arabic; the back office mirrors cleanly. No half-localised SaaS.
ForClinics.dentolizeBody: If your Dentolize is already syncing to a Google Calendar, you don't have to do anything. Patients book on Dental Map → event lands in Google Calendar → Dentolize picks it up automatically. We never touch Dentolize directly — your data, your software, your control.
ForClinics.dentolizeBullet1: No Dentolize credentials shared with us, ever
ForClinics.dentolizeBullet2: Works with Dentalore, Calendly, and any other Google-Calendar-aware tool too
ForClinics.dentolizeBullet3: Manual mode available for clinics that don't use Dentolize — slots come from your working hours
ForClinics.howSubtitle: From application to your first booking in under 24 hours.
ForClinics.how1Body: Send us your clinic name, area, dentist count, and a number to reach you on WhatsApp.
ForClinics.how2Body: We meet on WhatsApp or in person, set up your clinic profile, photos, fees, and connect your dentists' Google Calendars.
ForClinics.how3Body: Your clinic and dentists go live on Dental Map. Patients search, see your slots, and book.
ForClinics.how4Body: Bookings land in your Google Calendar (and Dentolize) and in your Dental Map dashboard. Confirm by WhatsApp, mark no-shows, done.
ForClinics.pricingFreeBody: Pilot pricing is free for everyone — no setup fees, no subscription, no commission. Patients pay you directly at the clinic, exactly like before.
ForClinics.pricingFutureBody: A small per-booking fee (around 5–10% of the consultation fee, capped at EGP 50). We'll give you 30 days notice and a chance to opt out before any change.
ForClinics.faq1Q: Will my Dentolize data be touched?
ForClinics.faq1A: No. We only read free/busy from a Google Calendar you connect, and write new appointment events into it. Whatever Dentolize does after that is between you and Dentolize. We never log into Dentolize.
ForClinics.faq2Q: What if I don't use a clinic management tool?
ForClinics.faq2A: Use Dental Map's manual mode. Slots are computed from your working hours minus existing Dental Map bookings. No Google Calendar required.
ForClinics.faq3Q: Can I cancel a booking on the patient's behalf?
ForClinics.faq3A: Yes — from your bookings inbox. The patient gets notified and the slot is freed.
ForClinics.faq4Q: What about reviews? What if a patient leaves a bad one unfairly?
ForClinics.faq4A: We require a completed appointment before any review. If a review is abusive or factually wrong, email us and we'll review it. We don't remove reviews just because they're negative — that destroys trust.
ForClinics.faq5A: The patient, directly to your clinic at the visit. Dental Map never holds money. The fee shown to the patient is the fee you set.
ForClinics.faq6A: Any time. Your data stays yours. We unpublish your clinic immediately and remove your data within 30 days on request.
ForClinics.finalBody: We're onboarding 20–50 Cairo clinics for the pilot. Apply today, go live this week.
ForClinics.applyEmailSubject: Apply to Dental Map clinic pilot
ForClinics.applyEmailBody:
Hi Dental Map team,

I'd like to join the Cairo clinic pilot.

Clinic name: 
Area: 
Number of dentists: 
Uses Dentolize: yes/no
My WhatsApp number: 
My role: 

Thanks!

Onboard.pageSubtitle: Tell us about your clinic and dentists. Takes 2 minutes — you can refine fees, photos, and bios from your dashboard later.
Onboard.whatsappHint: Optional — for one-click patient confirmation messages.
Onboard.title: Title
Onboard.successBody: We saved everything. Next: connect each dentist's Google Calendar from the dashboard, then publish when you're ready.
Onboard.workingHoursNote: We default to Sun–Thu 10:00–18:00 with a 14:00–15:00 lunch and 30-minute slots. You can adjust each dentist's working hours from the dashboard.
Onboard.publishNote: Your clinic starts as private. After we connect a Google Calendar (or you switch to manual mode) you can publish it from the dashboard so patients can find and book.

Legal.draftNotice: This is a working draft prepared for legal review. Final version will be issued before public launch. Reach us at legal@dentalmap.app with questions.

Account.title: My account
Account.emptyBody: When you book a dentist, your appointment shows up here. Cancel up to 2 hours before — no phone calls needed.
Account.cancelConfirmBody: We'll free up the slot and let the clinic know. You can rebook any time.
Account.errorTooLate: Too late to cancel — please call the clinic directly.
Account.errorServer: Something went wrong. Please try again.
